rag_rules: Preserve existing AADL architecture when inserting AGREE annex blocks
Place component type contracts in valid component type scopes
Place implementation-level contracts in valid implementation scopes
Do not use subcomponent ports in component type contracts unless represented through valid variables or outputs
generic_rules: Maintain consistent scope hierarchy when inserting annex blocks
Preserve existing component connections and subcomponents during fusion
Do not modify AADL structural elements outside the target component or implementation
Ensure inserted annex blocks do not introduce new structural dependencies
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: Use valid AADL annex syntax for AGREE contracts
Maintain proper scope nesting for assumptions and guarantees
Preserve existing AADL property associations during fusion
anti_patterns: Avoid modifying AADL structural elements outside the target scope
Do not introduce new structural dependencies through annex insertion
Preserve existing component connections and subcomponents during fusion
irrelevant_topics: AADL property names as AGREE variables
